pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 42-54: power1 input processlist set to '1:99991' (non-existent feed), solar input processlist set to '1:99992' (non-existent feed)
setup_task.sh lines 56-72: House Power feed interval set to 0 (line 58), House Temperature feed engine set to 0 (line 64), Solar PV feed tag set to empty string (line 70)

privileged_info_summary: Emoncms is an open-source web application for energy monitoring that uses Docker containers (emoncms-web, emoncms-db, redis) as confirmed by setup_emoncms.sh. The system uses PHPFina storage engine for time-series energy data. All data in this task is synthetic: 30 days of algorithmically-generated energy monitoring readings (power, solar, temperature data) created via Python functions in setup_emoncms.sh, not from real sensors or external sources. The task injects exactly 5 deliberate configuration errors: two broken input processlists (power1, solar) referencing non-existent feed IDs (99991, 99992), and three broken feeds (House Power with interval=0, House Temperature with engine=0, Solar PV with empty tag). The metadata correctly identifies these 5 broken configurations.
